ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded data */,
  "drybulb_temp" REAL /* Outdoor air dry bulb temperature in Celsius */,
  "wetbulb_temp" REAL /* Outdoor air wet bulb temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the data is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., office, residential) */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system (e.g., Heating, Cooling) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the system is located */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of system (e.g., HVAC, lighting) */,
  "system_model" TEXT /* Model of the system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the system was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_systems_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, engineer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the report is for */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Outdoor air temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the data is for */,
  "weather_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data (e.g., API, local sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the facility */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the sensor is located */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data collected */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the data is for */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the alert is for */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high energy consumption, low temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the alert is for */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the setting applies to */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the setting applies to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the setting */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, settings change) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
